item.title: Yellow House BBQ
item.description:
Low and slow. Fire and smoke.

Welcome to Yellow House BBQ.

item.title: About
item.description:
#Welcome to Yellow House BBQ - we’re glad you are here.#

Our Story

The love for smoke and fire started early — standing beside my Dad at the Weber kettle grill, learning that great BBQ isn’t>

Today, every cook centers around the Big Green Egg, paired with hand-sourced woods from a Colorado farm — featuring majorit>

We’re also proud to give back — as an active contributor to a local food kitchen, we believe great food should reach everyo>
